title: Layer-Architecture Confound Test: Layer-Preserving vs Degree-Preserving DAG Null Models for Motif Z-Scores
summary: Demo notebook implementing the layer-architecture confound test comparing degree-preserving vs layer-preserving DAG null models for motif Z-scores on Neuronpedia attribution graphs. Loads 3 diverse attribution graphs (country_capital, arithmetic, antonym domains), applies 75th-percentile edge pruning, generates null model ensembles via edge swaps, computes per-motif Z-scores and significance profiles, runs Wilcoxon signed-rank tests, and includes a layer-only baseline. Visualizes Z-score comparisons across null model types with grouped bar charts and per-graph scatter plots.
